body.title: agent_datacenter: contract test suite — every registered device implements full BaseDevice
body.result: 28 parametrized tests in tests/test_device_contract.py. Covers: isinstance, interface_version, health/who_am_i/comms shape, startup_errors list, uptime numeric, shim self_test shape, ABC enforcement. All pass.
body.description:
Parametrized tests that verify every registered device in agent_datacenter implements the full BaseDevice and BaseShim contracts.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/tests/fixtures/stub_devices.py:
  StubDevice(BaseDevice) — minimal concrete implementation of all 16 abstract methods
  StubShim(BaseShim) — minimal concrete shim
- agent_datacenter/tests/test_device_contract.py:
  ALL_DEVICE_CLASSES = [PostgresDevice, IgorDevice, ...] (extended as each Phase ships)
  @pytest.mark.parametrize('device_class', ALL_DEVICE_CLASSES)
  def test_implements_full_contract(device_class): check isinstance, all methods present
  def test_interface_version(device_class): interface_version() == INTERFACE_VERSION
  def test_health_shape(device_class): health() returns dict with 'healthy' key
  def test_stub_device_instantiates(): StubDevice() instantiates cleanly

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/tests/fixtures/stub_devices.py
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/tests/test_device_contract.py

Design rules:
- oop-first: StubDevice and StubShim in fixtures so every test can use them independently

Scope boundary:
IN: contract verification tests, StubDevice/StubShim fixtures
OUT: device-specific behavior tests (those live in each device's own test file)

Test plan:
- pytest tests/test_device_contract.py passes after PostgresDevice is implemented
- Adding a new device class that misses a method fails the parametrized test immediately
- StubDevice() instantiates with minimal correct return values
